results.title: PSG Would '100%' Try to Sign Barcelona Star Lamine Yamal: Insider
results.description: PSG would '100%' try to sign Barcelona's Lamine Yamal if the Spanish club ever opens the door, according to an insider. The 18-year-old is valued at $218M.
